headline: Is UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH) One of the Best Low Volatility Stocks to Invest in Right Now?
summary: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is one of the best low volatility stocks to invest in right now. On April 23, TD Cowen lifted the price target on UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) to $337 from $311, maintaining a Hold rating on the shares and noting that it reported better than expected results.
